# OpenDiabetic

> OpenDiabetic is privacy-first diabetic compute infrastructure — "the hive." Donated and owned compute earns income on the open market and recycles the net into free, real-world help for people living with diabetes. The compute does the heavy work so a person's medical records never have to leave their own home. Free to patients. Every dollar is recorded on a public, browser-verifiable ledger.

OpenDiabetic is the foundation/compute half of a two-part system:
- **OpenDiabetic (the hive):** donated GPUs and edge devices that fine-tune and host open AI models and rent compute to research and business for income. Records never ENTER the compute.
- **LocalDiabetic (the healers):** a private home vault, reminders, and on-box AI that live in the member's own home. Records never LEAVE the box.

Between them is a firewall: models flow down, receipts flow up, and protected health information (PHI) crosses NEVER — enforced in code, not policy.

## The model (how it funds free help forever)
- It costs the people nothing. Free to patients, no strings.
- A donated GPU is not burned like a charity dollar. It earns on the compute marketplace, and the net income is recycled into free gives — rides to the doctor, diabetic shoes, supplies, a home vault. The asset keeps working, then is recycled to next-generation hardware.
- Principle: "Give people what they need, not what you have."
- Not a warehouse — a federated network: donors host their own rigs at home; the firewall keeps a patient record from ever reaching a stranger's GPU.

## Trust (the anti-rug-pull)
Every donation, every dollar earned, and every give is recorded on a public, hash-chained ledger that anyone can recompute and verify in their own browser at https://diabeticledger.com.

## Key facts
- Founder: Donovan Mackey — a top commercial real-estate broker who is himself a Type 1 diabetic (lost toes, 14+ foot surgeries). Built from lived experience.
- Headquarters: Jupiter, Florida, USA.
- Contact: build@opendiabetic.com · Phone: +1 561-532-7120 · X/Twitter: https://x.com/opendiabetics

## Links
- https://opendiabetic.com — the hive: the model, what's live, ways to give
- https://localdiabetic.com — LocalDiabetic: the member's home vault and reminders
- https://diabeticledger.com — the public, browser-verified giving ledger

## Important
OpenDiabetic is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment, and is not a medical provider. It is privacy-first infrastructure and real-world support for people living with diabetes. For medical decisions, people are always told to confirm with their clinician.
